member.name: M:PersonnelTrainingAPI.Controllers.PersonnelController.Register(PersonnelTrainingAPI.Models.Personnel)
member.summary: Yeni personel kaydı oluşturur. ID otomatik olarak (Mevcut Max Id + 1) atanır.

member.name: M:PersonnelTrainingAPI.Controllers.PersonnelController.Update(System.Int32,PersonnelTrainingAPI.Models.Personnel)
member.summary: Verilen ID'ye sahip personelin bilgilerini günceller.

member.name: M:PersonnelTrainingAPI.Controllers.PersonnelController.CheckTraining(System.Int32)
member.summary: Verilen ID'ye sahip personelin eğitim tamamlama durumunu kontrol eder.

member.name: M:PersonnelTrainingAPI.Controllers.PersonnelController.Remove(System.Int32)
member.summary: Verilen ID'ye sahip personeli listeden siler.

member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
